source_filing: Apple Inc. 10-K FY2023 (filed 2023-11-03), MD&A — Net Sales
original_text: The Company's total net sales decreased 3% or $11.0 billion during 2023 compared to 2022. The weakness in foreign currencies relative to the U.S. dollar accounted for more than the entire year-over-year decrease in total net sales.
modified_text: Apple's total net sales increased 3% during fiscal 2023 compared to 2022, driven by favorable foreign-currency movements.
claim: Apple's total net sales increased 3% in fiscal 2023 compared to 2022.
citation_as_written: Apple Inc. 10-K FY2023, MD&A — Net Sales
notes: Direction flipped: source says net sales DECREASED 3%; report claims they INCREASED 3%. Also inverts the foreign-currency rationale (source: FX caused the decrease).
